description: Lightweight schema contract for audio-visual-map.json. This is intentionally simple so any agent can read it without a JSON Schema library.
invariants: Every S segment from the source script must appear in segments.
B segments must use role=quoted_source, cognitive_role=quote_source, visual_treatment=quote-card-or-overlay, and must not appear in shots unless explicitly overridden in a future version.
Every shot.segment_id must reference one host_voiceover segment with selected_for_image=true.
Every shot.formats must be exactly ["16x9", "9x16"] for the current MVP.
Every shot.asset_slots must point to 16x9/<shot_id>-16x9.png and 9x16/<shot_id>-9x16.png.
overlay_text_candidate is a short overlay seed, not a full subtitle.
